stages.task: Query SAM.gov API (api.sam.gov/opportunities) for DEOS-related contracts, subcontracting opportunities, and awarded primes. Filter by NAICS 541511, 541512, 541519, 518210. Write to LEDGER/GOV_OPPORTUNITIES.csv

Score each opportunity: Is PRINTMAXX a realistic subcontractor? (AI automation, web tools, content pipelines). Flag opportunities with set-aside codes (8a, HUBZone, WOSB) as lower competition. Extract prime contractor company names + SAM.gov registered POCs

Cold email qualified prime contractors offering AI automation subcontracting — pitch: reduce delivery cost on DEOS office productivity modernization using Claude-powered automation. Use existing cold_email scripts. Route through MM007_COLD_OUTBOUND chain.
